common.restartRequired: Config updated. Restart Gateway for changes to take effect.
common.restartFailed: Restart failed. Please restart Gateway manually.

welcome.title: Welcome to ClickClaw
welcome.subtitle: One-click OpenClaw desktop manager. Deploy your AI Agent in minutes.

provider.title: Choose AI Model Provider
provider.subtitle: Pick a provider first, then configure platform, model, and API key.
provider.sectionRecommendedDesc: Shown first and suitable for most users.
provider.sectionChinaDesc: More stable connectivity for users in mainland China.
provider.sectionInternationalDesc: Best for users who already have international API keys.
provider.verifyReady: Verification completed. You can continue to the next step.
provider.syncPresetsFailed: Failed to sync latest provider list, using local presets
provider.modelHint: Choose from the preset list or type a model ID manually.
provider.customModeDesc: Enter the provider ID, base URL, API type, and model ID manually.

channel.title: Choose IM Channels
channel.subtitle: Select which IM channels to use for chatting with your AI Agent. You can change this later.
channel.skipHint: You can skip this step and configure IM channels later

confirm.title: Confirm Configuration
confirm.subtitle: Review your settings below. Click "Complete Setup" to save and launch Gateway.

launch.title: Launching OpenClaw Gateway
launch.successHint: OpenClaw is running on port {{port}}. You're all set!

dashboard.title: ClickClaw Dashboard
dashboard.gatewayDesc: Gateway is not running. Click Start to begin.

stat.noAgent: No agents yet. Create your first one.
stat.noChannel: No chat channels connected yet (optional for now)

log.title: Gateway Log
log.empty: No logs yet. Start the service engine first.
log.startGateway: After starting the service engine, runtime status will appear here

beginner.title: Beginner Checklist
beginner.subtitle: Complete these 3 steps for your first usable setup

gateway.title: Start service engine
gateway.desc: You need this before chatting or receiving messages

model.title: Configure model
model.desc: Set at least one default model

channel.title: Connect chat channel (optional)
channel.desc: Connect Feishu/WeCom to use via IM

welcome.title: Connect to OpenClaw
welcome.description: Start the Gateway first, then you can chat with AI.
welcome.readyHint: Send a message to chat with OpenClaw AI in real time.

sender.placeholder: Send a message (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line)

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.deleteConfirmContent: Delete session "{{label}}"? This cannot be undone.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.placeholder: Drag & drop files here, or click to add

prompts.title: Quick Start
prompts.groupStartDesc: Explore what AI can do for you
prompts.start2: What can you do? Give me some examples
prompts.start3: Show me a problem you're good at solving
prompts.assist1: Help me write a concise work report template
prompts.assist2: Help me summarize the key points of:
prompts.assist3: Translate the following into fluent English:
prompts.think1: Please analyze the pros and cons of:
prompts.think2: Give me three solutions for this problem and compare them:
prompts.think3: List the detailed steps to accomplish this:

commands.exec: Set exec defaults for this session
commands.focus: Bind thread to a session target

models.title: Model Configuration
models.noProvidersHint: Click "Add Provider" to configure your first AI model provider
models.emptyHint: Add a provider to let ClickClaw power your AI Agent
models.fallbacksHint: When primary fails, OpenClaw will fallback in this order.
models.primaryAndFallbacksHint: You can set primary and fallback models together. Fallbacks apply in order.
models.providerKeyHint: Unique identifier, cannot be changed after creation (e.g. anthropic, openai)
models.apiKeyHint: API Key will be written to openclaw.json. Consider using environment variables.
models.deleteProviderConfirm: Delete provider "{{name}}"? All models under it will be removed.
models.deleteProviderDesc: All models under this provider will also be removed
models.selectAtLeastOneModel: Select at least one model to continue
models.autoAddModels: These models will be automatically configured
models.canEditModels: You can add or remove models anytime
models.noModels: No models yet. Add one below.
models.fetchRemoteListHint: Fetch available models from the provider API
models.loadFailedHint: Please ensure the Electron main process has fully restarted
models.customTagline: Manually configure Base URL and API protocol

agents.title: Agent Management
agents.emptyHint: Click "New Agent" to create your first AI assistant
agents.deleteConfirmContent: Delete agent "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
agents.mainSessionProtected: Built-in main agent cannot be deleted
agents.noSelectionHint: Select an agent from the list on the left to view details or edit files

tools.wsRequired: Gateway connection required to load tool details
tools.wsHint: Connect to view tool descriptions and configure permissions
tools.elevatedHint: Allows the agent to execute high-risk operations (file deletion, system commands, etc.). Use with caution.

files.noFilesHint: Files will be created automatically when the agent runs for the first time
files.wsRequired: Gateway connection required to access files

agents_md.desc: Defines the agent's identity, behavioral boundaries, and reply style. The file-based equivalent of a system prompt — determines what the agent "is".

soul_md.desc: The immutable personality core. Defines who the agent "is" at a fundamental level. Unlike AGENTS.md, this file should not be modified by subsequent conversations.

user_md.desc: Structured information about the user — name, preferences, relationship context — helping the agent better understand who it's talking to.

memory_md.desc: Long-term memory store. The agent actively writes persistent facts, decisions, and important information here during conversations.

heartbeat_md.desc: Defines scheduled tasks and proactive behaviors, e.g. "check task status every 30 minutes".

sessions_json.desc: Session metadata store — records the status, history, and configuration of each session.

tools_md.desc: Local tool environment notes — your personal cheat sheet for device nicknames, SSH host aliases, camera locations, TTS preferences, and other setup-specific details. Skills are shareable; TOOLS.md is yours alone.
tools_md.when: Loaded on: on demand when the agent invokes tools

identity_md.desc: The agent's identity record — defines name, personality vibe, signature emoji, and avatar path. Gives the agent a stable sense of self and consistent character.
identity_md.when: Loaded on: at the start of every conversation

skills.title: Skills Permissions
skills.usingAllowlist: Custom allowlist active — only listed skills are available to this agent
skills.usingAll: All skills enabled — disabling any skill will create a per-agent allowlist
skills.wsRequired: Gateway connection required to load this agent's skills

form.title: {{mode}} Agent
form.name: ID
form.nameHint: Stable unique identifier, cannot be changed after creation
form.themeHint: Describes the agent's style or personality (free text, e.g. helpful sloth)
form.modelHint: Format: provider/model. Leave empty to use default model
form.workspaceHint: Agent's default workspace (leave empty for system default)
form.agentDirHint: Directory for agent persistent data (memory, session history)
form.toolsProfileHint: Set of tools available to this agent

channels.title: IM Channel Configuration
channels.noChannelsHint: Click "Add IM Channel" to configure your first IM channel
channels.deleteConfirmContent: Delete IM channel "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

card.weixinNoAccountHint: Click Connect WeChat to connect with QR login

configDrawer.manualSetupHint: If you already created the app in the platform console, you can enter credentials manually.
configDrawer.gatewayRequired: Start Gateway and wait for connection to be ready
configDrawer.weixinScanHint: Use WeChat to scan the QR code below and confirm on your phone
configDrawer.weixinScanWaiting: QR code is ready. Waiting for WeChat confirmation...
configDrawer.weixinBundledReady: The WeChat plugin is bundled with ClickClaw. No extra installation is needed.
configDrawer.weixinBundledMissing: Bundled WeChat plugin was not found. Check whether the current app package is complete.
configDrawer.weixinPluginDisabled: The WeChat plugin is not enabled in the current config yet. Finish setup or save settings again first.
configDrawer.weixinConfigMissing: OpenClaw config has not been created yet. The WeChat plugin will be enabled automatically after setup.
configDrawer.weixinRestartContent: The WeChat account has been saved. Restart Gateway now to make it take effect immediately.
configDrawer.weixinRestartSuccess: Gateway restarted. WeChat connection is now active
configDrawer.wecomScanWaiting: Scan the QR below, waiting for result...
configDrawer.wecomScanSuccess: Scan succeeded, Bot ID and Secret were filled in
configDrawer.wecomConnectedReady: WeCom is connected and ready to use.
configDrawer.wecomScanAppHint: Use the WeCom app to scan the QR code below and authorize
configDrawer.wecomQuickAuthDesc: Scan with the WeCom app and ClickClaw will finish setup automatically. No need to enter Bot ID or Secret.
configDrawer.wecomRetryContent: WeCom returned success, but Bot ID / Secret was not returned yet. Retry now?
configDrawer.feishuScanWaiting: Scan the QR below, waiting for result...
configDrawer.feishuScanSuccess: Scan succeeded, App ID and App Secret were filled in
configDrawer.feishuConnectedReady: Feishu is connected and ready to use.
configDrawer.feishuScanAppHint: Use the Feishu app to scan the QR code below and authorize
configDrawer.feishuQuickAuthDesc: Scan with the Feishu app and ClickClaw will finish setup automatically. China mainland Feishu is used by default.
configDrawer.feishuBlockStreamingHint: Return full message instead of streaming chunks

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.deleteConfirmContent: Delete account "{{id}}"? This cannot be undone.
accounts.weixinIdAutoGenerated: The account ID for a WeChat connection will be generated automatically after QR login.
accounts.quickAuthIdAutoGenerated: The account ID will be generated automatically after QR login.
accounts.idInvalid: Only letters, numbers and hyphens are allowed

pairing.approveSuccess: Approved — the user can now chat with you

control.gatewayNotRunningHint: Please start the Gateway first to access the OpenClaw Control UI.

configFound.title: Existing Configuration Found
configFound.description: An existing OpenClaw configuration was found. You can use it directly or reconfigure.

logs.title: Logs
logs.noLogs: No logs yet. Logs will appear after Gateway starts.

backup.title: Backup
backup.fullDesc: Includes openclaw.json + all agents data + workspace
backup.confirmRestoreDesc: Gateway must be restarted after restoring. Current config will be replaced.
backup.snapshotDesc: Save current config as a snapshot for quick restore

skills.uninstallConfirm: Uninstall skill "{{name}}"? This will permanently delete the local files.
skills.noInstalledHint: Go to the "Discover" tab to browse and install skills
skills.gatewayOfflineHint: Gateway is not connected. Start the Gateway to manage Skills.

general.title: General
general.launchAtLoginDesc: Automatically start ClickClaw when you log in

gateway.portDesc: Gateway HTTP listen port (default 18789). Restart required after change.
gateway.autoStartDesc: Automatically start the Gateway process when the app launches

remotePresets.title: Model Data Source
remotePresets.statusEmpty: No remote data yet (not fetched or network unavailable)

proxy.title: Network Proxy
proxy.enableDesc: All ClickClaw and OpenClaw AI requests will be routed through the proxy
proxy.urlDesc: Supports HTTP, HTTPS and SOCKS5 (e.g. socks5://127.0.0.1:1080)
proxy.bypassDesc: Semicolon-separated hosts/IPs that bypass the proxy
proxy.telegramNote: Telegram channel detected — proxy URL synced to channel config

versions.title: Versions & Updates
versions.engineVersionDesc: Gateway core engine — updates independently from the app

openclaw.upgradeSuccess: Upgrade successful. Restart Gateway to apply.
openclaw.upgradeFailed: Upgrade failed. Check logs for details.
